models.label: Qwen 3.5 2B
models.description: Blazing fast. Best for quick questions and simple tasks. Cheapest option.

models.label: Llama 3.2 3B
models.description: Tiny and fast. Good for simple Q&A, summaries, and lightweight tasks.

models.label: Llama 3 8B
models.description: Solid everyday model. Good for writing, Q&A, and simple tasks.

models.label: Mistral 7B
models.description: Lightweight and precise. Great for structured answers and formatting.

models.label: Qwen 3.5 27B
models.description: Balanced mid-size model. Strong general performance at a good speed.

models.label: Llama 3.1 70B
models.description: Powerful all-rounder. Best for complex questions and long documents.

models.label: Llama 4 Scout
models.description: Meta's latest. Massive 328K context window — great for long documents and big codebases.

models.label: Qwen 2.5 72B
models.description: Top pick for code. Excels at multi-language programming, debugging, and technical analysis.

models.label: DeepSeek V3.2
models.description: Best open-source coding model. Rivals GPT-4 on coding benchmarks. Great for complex projects.

models.label: DeepSeek R1 7B
models.description: Fast chain-of-thought reasoner. Good for math, logic, and step-by-step debugging.

models.label: DeepSeek R1
models.description: Full R1 — the best open-source reasoning model. Slower but exceptional at hard problems.

models.label: Llama 3.2 11B Vision
models.description: Reads images. Send photos, screenshots, or diagrams alongside your question.

models.label: Llama 3.2 90B Vision
models.description: Advanced vision. Best for detailed image analysis, charts, and technical drawings.

models.label: Qwen 2.5 VL 72B
models.description: Powerful vision model. Excellent at reading documents, charts, and complex images.
